windows.embed_text_v2: pouring molten amber wax from glass measuring pitcher into jars to the lip, wicks centered with wooden clothespins, candle making filling jars on wooden table, golden liquid wax
windows.summary_v2: Molten amber wax is poured from a measuring pitcher into glass jars whose wicks are held centered by clothespins.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down of two glass jars of amber molten wax on a wooden table, wicks held centered by wooden clothespins; a glass pitcher of wax begins pouring into the right jar.
Molten amber wax streams from the measuring pitcher into the right jar, raising its level toward the rim.
Pouring continues steadily into the right jar; the left jar sits filled with its wick pinned across the top.
The pitcher tips further, filling the right jar with golden wax right up near the lip.
Wax level in the right jar nears the top edge as the pour slows, clothespin keeping the wick upright.
The pour fills the jar to the lip; a thin drip runs from the pitcher spout over the wick string.
Pitcher lifts away from the now-full right jar, both jars topped with amber wax and pinned wicks.
Pitcher retracts upward; both filled jars sit side by side with wicks held by clothespins.
Wider top-down showing three filled wax jars with clothespin wick holders, a metal scale and amber pitcher at the table edge.

windows.embed_text_v2: freshly poured amber wax jars setting and cooling on wooden table, wicks centered with wooden clothespins, candle making curing stage, jars of molten wax left undisturbed, metal scale
windows.summary_v2: Freshly poured jars of amber wax with clothespin-held wicks are left undisturbed on the table to cool and set.

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down of three glass jars filled with amber molten wax on a wooden table, each wick held centered by a wooden clothespin laid across the rim; a metal scale at left.
The freshly poured jars sit undisturbed to set, clothespins steadying the wicks; an amber pitcher rests at upper right.
Static overhead of the three filled wax jars cooling, wicks pinned upright, dark glass jar at top-left of frame.
Camera holds on the jars of setting wax; a hand-tinted orange object appears briefly at the right edge.
The filled jars remain in place with their clothespin wick holders as the wax begins to cool.
View shifts slightly; the jars of amber wax sit on the wooden bench, wicks centered by pins, left jar partly off-frame.
Top-down pan brings the two right jars to center, both topped with molten wax and clothespin-held wicks.
The two filled jars sit side by side cooling, wicks suspended by wooden clothespins across their mouths.
Closer overhead of the two amber wax jars left to set undisturbed, clothespin wick holders keeping wicks upright.
